org.docgene.parser

Interface DirectoryParser


  • public interface DirectoryParser
    The directory parser interface.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addError(java.lang.String message)
      Add an error message
      void addInfo(java.lang.String message)
      Add an information message
      org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler getErrorHandler()
      Return the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the parsing.
      ArticlesModel getModel()
      Return the Articles Model.
      boolean hasExceptions()
      Return true if there were exceptions encountered during the parsing.
      void parseDirectories(java.io.File[] dirs)
      Parse the input directories.
      default void parseDirectoriesAndResolve(java.io.File[] dirs)
      Parse the input directories, and resolve.
      void resolve()
      Resolve after parsing the directories.
      void setErrorHandler(org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler errorHandler)
      Set the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the parsing.
      void setIndexFile(java.io.File indexFile)
      Set the index file.
      void setModel(ArticlesModel model)
      Set the model.
      void setParserExternalHandler(org.docgene.parser.ParserExternalHandler externalHandler)
      Set the optional parser external handler, which can be fired on events when parsing the wiki
      org.docgene.main.ErrorLogger showParserExceptions()
      Show error logger.

    • Method Detail

      • getModel

        ArticlesModel getModel()
        Return the Articles Model.
        Returns:
        the Articles Model

      • setModel

        void setModel(ArticlesModel model)
        Set the model.
        Parameters:
        model - the model

      • setIndexFile

        void setIndexFile(java.io.File indexFile)
        Set the index file. The index file can be set if more than one root directory is selected.
        Parameters:
        indexFile - the index file

      • setParserExternalHandler

        void setParserExternalHandler(org.docgene.parser.ParserExternalHandler externalHandler)
        Set the optional parser external handler, which can be fired on events when parsing the wiki
        Parameters:
        externalHandler - the optional parser external handle

      • parseDirectoriesAndResolve

        default void parseDirectoriesAndResolve(java.io.File[] dirs)
        Parse the input directories, and resolve.
        Parameters:
        dirs - the input directories

      • parseDirectories

        void parseDirectories(java.io.File[] dirs)
        Parse the input directories.
        Parameters:
        dirs - the input directories

      • resolve

        void resolve()
        Resolve after parsing the directories.

      • showParserExceptions

        org.docgene.main.ErrorLogger showParserExceptions()
        Show error logger. Will be null if there are no exceptions.
        Returns:
        the error logger. Will be null if there are no exceptions

      • hasExceptions

        boolean hasExceptions()
        Return true if there were exceptions encountered during the parsing.
        Returns:
        true if there were exceptions encountered during the parsing

      • setErrorHandler

        void setErrorHandler(org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler errorHandler)
        Set the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the parsing.
        Parameters:
        errorHandler - the error handler

      • getErrorHandler

        org.docgene.parser.XMLErrorHandler getErrorHandler()
        Return the error handler which will be used to create and store errors or informations during the parsing.
        Returns:
        the error handler

      • addInfo

        void addInfo(java.lang.String message)
        Add an information message
        Parameters:
        message - the message

        void addError(java.lang.String message)
        Add an error message
